description: One whose essence resonates perfectly with our own across lifetimes. Soulmate encompasses recognition beyond words, complementary wholeness, destined meeting, and the understanding that soulmates complete each other's songs.
rationale: The word 'thioma' begins with contemplative 'thi', opens through 'o' (creating vowel hiatus), and nurtures in 'ma'. This three-syllable journey with both fricative and hiatus captures soulmates as deep recognition opening into nurturing unity.
